transactions.description: Chicago Cubs sent RF Seiya Suzuki on a rehab assignment to Knoxville Smokies.
Chicago Cubs placed RHP Cade Horton on the 15-day injured list retroactive to April 4, 2026. Right forearm strain.
Chicago Cubs recalled LHP Riley Martin from Iowa Cubs.
Chicago Cubs recalled RHP Ethan Roberts from Iowa Cubs.
Chicago Cubs placed LHP Matthew Boyd on the 15-day injured list retroactive to April 3, 2026. Left biceps strain.
RHP Ethan Roberts returned to Iowa Cubs from Chicago Cubs.
Chicago Cubs recalled RHP Javier Assad from Iowa Cubs.
